message:
fix(core): add warning logs to all silent serde_json serialization failures

Replace every serde_json::to_string().unwrap_or_default() and
serde_json::to_string().ok() in production code with versions that log
tracing::warn on failure before falling back. This eliminates 24
instances of silent error swallowing across 10 files:

- events.rs: event value rendering (1)
- plan.rs: action display for StoreData/RunWorkflow/Custom (3)
- storage.rs: record_event, upsert_workflow, upsert_agent_session (5)
- search/indexing.rs: dedupe_basis metadata (1)
- workflows.rs: step results, summaries, verification refs, quota audit (10)
- policy.rs: decision_context in audit records (3)
- crash.rs: crash dump export (1)
- snapshot_engine.rs: terminal/env/agent state serialization (3)
- recorder_lexical_schema.rs: schema fingerprint (1)
- web.rs: SSE frame serialization (1)

Previously, serialization failures produced empty strings or None with
no indication that data was lost. Now each site logs the specific error
and field name for diagnostic visibility.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -3071,7 +3071,9 @@ impl InjectionResult {
                 verification_summary: None,
                 decision_context: decision
                     .context()
-                    .and_then(|ctx| serde_json::to_string(ctx).ok()),
+                    .and_then(|ctx| serde_json::to_string(ctx)
+                        .inspect_err(|e| tracing::warn!(error = %e, "policy decision_context serialization failed"))
+                        .ok()),
                 result: "success".to_string(),
             },
             Self::Denied {
@@ -3096,7 +3098,9 @@ impl InjectionResult {
                 verification_summary: None,

                     .context()
-                    .and_then(|ctx| serde_json::to_string(ctx).ok()),
+                    .and_then(|ctx| serde_json::to_string(ctx)
+                        .inspect_err(|e| tracing::warn!(error = %e, "policy decision_context serialization failed"))
+                        .ok()),
                 result: "denied".to_string(),
             },
             Self::RequiresApproval {
@@ -3121,7 +3125,9 @@ impl InjectionResult {
                 verification_summary: None,
                 decision_context: decision
                     .context()
-                    .and_then(|ctx| serde_json::to_string(ctx).ok()),
+                    .and_then(|ctx| serde_json::to_string(ctx)
+                        .inspect_err(|e| tracing::warn!(error = %e, "policy decision_context serialization failed"))
+                        .ok()),
                 result: "require_approval".to_string(),
             },
             Self::Error {
